campaign.title: Life-cycle fidelity under VLM judge (improving on ASAL)
campaign.problem: Discover simulation parameters in Lenia and Flow-Lenia whose rollouts score highest under a multimodal-LLM rubric covering 5 tiers of life-like behavior (existence, agency, robustness, reproduction, coherence), judged by Claude Sonnet 4.6 on 16 held-out seeds against a pinned baseline.
